name: create_prow_job_runs_new
description: Create prow_job_runs_new partitioned table (LIST by prow_job_release)
query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prow_job_runs_new (
	id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	deleted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	prow_job_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	prow_job_release TEXT NOT NULL,
	cluster TEXT,
	gcs_bucket TEXT,
	url TEXT,
	test_failures INT,
	failed BOOLEAN,
	infrastructure_failure BOOLEAN,
	known_failure BOOLEAN,
	succeeded BOOLEAN,
	timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
	duration BIGINT,
	overall_result TEXT,
	labels TEXT[],
	PRIMARY KEY (id, prow_job_release, timestamp)
) PARTITION BY LIST (prow_job_release)

name: create_prow_job_run_annotations_new
description: Create prow_job_run_annotations_new partitioned table (LIST by prow_job_run_release)
query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prow_job_run_annotations_new (
	id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	deleted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	prow_job_run_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	key TEXT NOT NULL,
	value TEXT,
	prow_job_run_release TEXT NOT NULL,
	prow_job_run_timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
	PRIMARY KEY (id, prow_job_run_release, prow_job_run_timestamp)
) PARTITION BY LIST (prow_job_run_release)

name: create_prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_new
description: Create prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_new partitioned table (LIST by prow_job_run_release)
query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prow_job_run_prow_pull_requests_new (
	prow_job_run_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	prow_pull_request_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	prow_job_run_release TEXT NOT NULL,
	prow_job_run_timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
	PRIMARY KEY (prow_job_run_id, prow_pull_request_id, prow_job_run_release, prow_job_run_timestamp)
) PARTITION BY LIST (prow_job_run_release)

name: create_prow_job_run_tests_new
description: Create prow_job_run_tests_new partitioned table (LIST by prow_job_run_release)
query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prow_job_run_tests_new (
	id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	deleted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	prow_job_run_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	prow_job_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	prow_job_run_timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
	prow_job_run_release TEXT NOT NULL,
	test_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	suite_id BIGINT,
	status INT,
	duration DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PRIMARY KEY (id, prow_job_run_release, prow_job_run_timestamp)
) PARTITION BY LIST (prow_job_run_release)

name: create_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new
description: Create prow_job_run_test_outputs_new partitioned table (LIST by prow_job_run_test_release)
query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prow_job_run_test_outputs_new (
	id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	deleted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	prow_job_run_test_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	output TEXT,
	prow_job_run_test_timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
	prow_job_run_test_release TEXT NOT NULL,
	PRIMARY KEY (id, prow_job_run_test_release, prow_job_run_test_timestamp)
) PARTITION BY LIST (prow_job_run_test_release)

name: idx_prow_job_runs_new_release_timestamp
description: Index on prow_job_runs_new for release and timestamp queries
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_runs_new_release_timestamp ON prow_job_runs_new (prow_job_release, timestamp)

name: idx_prow_job_runs_new_prow_job_id
description: Index on prow_job_runs_new for prow_job_id lookups
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_runs_new_prow_job_id ON prow_job_runs_new (prow_job_id)

query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_runs_new_timestamp ON prow_job_runs_new (timestamp)

description: Foreign key from prow_job_runs_new to prow_jobs
